differential_diagnoses: Infective endocarditis (Staphylococcus aureus) with septic emboli
Disseminated malignancy with nonbacterial thrombotic endocarditis
next_steps: Serial blood cultures and incubation for fastidious organisms
Serologic testing for Antiphospholipid antibodies and Lupus markers
Urgent biopsy of skin petechiae if present
Biopsy of splenic or lung lesions if clinically indicated
